name: No Bake Fruit Cake 2
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Nuts of choice (I always use pecans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except crushed cookies, leaving fruit and nuts whole or cut up as desired.
2. Mix well to distribute the fruit and nuts evenly in the milk.
3. Gradually add the crushed cookies to the mixture and stir until combined.
4. When the mixture is no longer noticeably sticky, it is ready.
5. Butter your loaf or ring pan thoroughly.
6. Spoon the fruit cake mixture into the prepared pan and press down firmly with the back of a greased spoon. Alternatively, you can use greased hands to pack the mixture well.
6. Cover the pan with plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for at least 2 days.
7. When ready to serve, remove from the refrigerator and turn off on a serving plate.
8. Any leftovers should be stored back in the refrigerator.
